text_block_list.text:
I've pondered the meaning of Neo Universe's words 
since our last encounter.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
…Admire Groove's Window reflects Loss… 
Yours reflects… Restoration.

Frankly, I don't have a clue what she was talking about. 
Nor what's up with that strange dream I seem to have 
shared with Admire Groove.
choice_data_list: However…

text_block_list.text:
Incomprehensible as it all is, one thing is still clear 
to me — she's currently suffering, and alone.

If this recurring nightmare that's tormenting her 
involves Still in Love, then…
choice_data_list: (Problems are solved… at their source!)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …What business do you have with me this time? Carrying all these documents on Still in Love, no less…
choice_data_list: <size=30>You should have a look at them, if you want to take her on.</size>

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(…This person knows about my race with her… 
More than that, somehow they're even aware 
that she shows up in my nightmares…)
choice_data_list: <size=32>If these aren't useful, you can just throw them away.</size>

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …Fine. But… I would ask that you leave me alone after that.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: This data… includes both of us…?
choice_data_list: <size=30>Comparisons including the very latest developments, yes.</size>
<size=30>Comparisons including the very latest developments, yes.</size>

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
I thought official data on her was near nonexistent. 
To have this much of it… did you follow her around 
and calculate it by yourself?

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
…I must say, she certainly has been improving rapidly 
over the past month, judging by this… Could something 
have happened to her to cause this…?
choice_data_list: <size=34>Hard to say. Perhaps a change in her environment?</size>

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
Her environment… That sounds reasonable, but… 
No, there's no point to speculating.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
…So, what do you expect me to gain from this data? 
…Are these countermeasures? Against her…?

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …In short, you think I should try a different style of running?
choice_data_list: Yeah. I have you down as a surger.
Yep. I have you down as a surger.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(—— "Loss of concentration leading to disrupted pace"… 
This is a lot to pick up on and analyze from a quick race 
with no recordings. Simply by watching…)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(Since there's a higher likelihood of succumbing to pressure 
when running nearer the front, they suggest taking up position 
further back, surging through later…)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(…I can't deny I'd rather keep that feeling of fangs 
ready to sink into my neck to a minimum.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
However, to pull this off, not only will I need to further control 
my pace early on, I'll need the leg power to surge past her even 
as she continues to improve.
choice_data_list: <size=38>I already drew up a regimen with this in mind.</size>

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …What do you gain out of doing this?
choice_data_list: I just… want to see you win. Nothing more.
I just… want to see you win. Nothing more.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
Even so… you aren't even my trainer. 
You hold no responsibility or obligation to any of this.
choice_data_list: That's irrelevant now. Are you in, or not?
That's irrelevant now. Are you in, or not?

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(…The way they talk, they do seem to have 
some ulterior motive…)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(Nevertheless, if I want to take the fight to her, I must exceed 
her own rapid rate of improvement. At the moment… anything 
that gives me an edge is welcome.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …Fine then. I'll accept your proposal.
Several weeks later…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(Everything is following expectations so far… Both her ability 
and the race situation closely match that trainer's predictions. 
I'm confident I can surge past…!)

text_block_list.name: Still in Love
text_block_list.text: Ahhh… Yes… Yeeessss… I sense… the presence… of a delectable soul…!

text_block_list.name: Still in Love
text_block_list.text: …Ahahahahahahaha!! More, mooore!! Let us enjoy this to the fulleeeest!
choice_data_list: Her aura completely changed…!?

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: (…! I knew there was something! But… you're too late!)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: Hraaaaaagh!!

text_block_list.name: Still in Love
text_block_list.text:
I wish… I wish to meet you again… in a real race. 
Let's see, yes… perhaps a leg of the Tiara?

text_block_list.name: Still in Love
text_block_list.text: By that time… I hope you'll be even more… delectable.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
Here I thought I could finally rid myself of this gloom… 
Seems I'll have to bear it for the time being.
choice_data_list: …It looked like she told you something?

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
…She seems to be hoping to settle this over the Triple Tiara. 
Should I take it to mean that abominable dream is trying to 
manifest itself?
choice_data_list: <size=34>(So we are indeed heading for a battle at the Tiara.)</size>
<size=34>(So we are indeed heading for a battle at the Tiara.)</size>

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
…Your data on her improvement was fairly accurate. 
Unfortunately, I very much doubt she has brought out 
all of her latent potential.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: Good grief… it makes my head hurt.
choice_data_list: …I have a suggestion in this regard.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
choice_data_list: <size=30>You could use someone to gather and analyse info, right?</size>
<size=30>You could use someone to gather and analyse info, right?</size>

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: You… Are you suggesting a contract between us?

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(…Certainly, there can be little doubt regarding this person's 
abilities as a trainer… and they do understand the threat 
Still in Love poses…)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
…I'll say this before you get any ideas — all I am looking for 
is results. I don't need somebody for… cozy conversations.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
I will win races and defeat that girl. You will simply do your job, 
providing me with the required support. Those… are the limits 
of what our contract will entail.
choice_data_list: I understand. Besides…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
choice_data_list: <size=38>If your sole goal is to settle things with her…</size>
<size=38>If your sole goal is to settle things with her…</size>

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
choice_data_list: <size=34>Then I don't mind if our contract ends at that point.</size>

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …Indeed, yes, that would be perfect.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
My goal will be to gain a decisive victory over her. 
Before… the end of the Triple Tiara races, which she 
herself brought up.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
…I will take your hand. Until — and only until — that time 
I settle my score with her.

This was the first of my contracts with her. 
This horsegirl… and her frigid gaze.

In order to guide her to victory against Still in Love. 
Because I… did not want her to have to fight all on her own.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Feeling as though "something" is present, even in 
seemingly empty space, hmm…

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Have you ever felt anything like that, Dura?

text_block_list.name: Duramente
text_block_list.text: Groove…? What do you mean by that…?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: …Nothing, forget I mentioned it.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
Ether concentration… in Window of Restoration… rising. 
Observations… stabilizing.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text: Admire Groove… Restoration… desirable.
